input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.11.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.11.3
            TITLE: rain test completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.11.3: Rain Test Completion
IN.11.3 Rain Test Completion 
The test is passed if the Insulation Monitoring Device (EV.7.6) does not react during the entire 
240 seconds duration

final_answer: rule IN.11.3: Rain Test Completion The test is passed if the Insulation Monitoring Device (EV.7.6) does not react during the entire 240 seconds duration
